zh.St Leonards, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可聖 萊昂納--希亞
zh.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可聖 萊昂納--希亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex於大約1312年出生在英國英格蘭素可聖 萊昂納--希亞時，他的父親Stephen de Peplesham34歲，母親Peplesham34歲。他與Joane Rowse在英國素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年在英國英格蘭素可享年50歲，埋葬在英國素可瓦特林。

zh-hans.St Leonards, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可聖 萊昂納--希亞
zh-hans.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: 英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可聖 萊昂納--希亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex于大约1312年出生在英国英格兰素可聖 萊昂納--希亞时，他的父亲Stephen de Peplesham34岁，母亲Peplesham34岁。他与Joane Rowse在英国素可瓦特林结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年在英国英格兰素可享年50岁，埋葬在英国素可瓦特林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Symon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex was born about 1312, in St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen de Peplesham, was 34 and his mother, Peplesham, was 34. He married Joane Rowse in Wartling, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1361, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Wartling, Sussex, England.

fr.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex est né environ 1312, à St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de Peplesham, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Peplesham, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joane Rowse à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1361, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex um 1312 in St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Peplesham 34 und seine Mutter Peplesham 34. Er hat in Wartling, Sussex, England Joane Rowse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wartling, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex è nato il circa 1312 nel St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen de Peplesham, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Peplesham, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joane Rowse nel Wartling, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1361, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Wartling, Sussex, England.

ja.Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussexが約1312年にイギリスイギリススセックススト レオナルドス-オン-セアで生まれた時，父Stephen de Pepleshamは34歳，母Pepleshamは34歳であった。イギリススセックスワートリングでJoane Rowseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年にイギリスイギリススセックスで50歳で死去し，イギリススセックスワートリングにて埋葬された。

ko.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 스트 리나르드스--시
ko.lifeSummary: Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스트 리나르드스--시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Peplesham(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Peplesham(은)는 34세였다. 그는 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 Joane Rowse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 워틀링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen de Peplesham, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Peplesham, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Rowse em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: ст леонардс-он-сеа, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex родился около 1312 г. в местности ст леонардс-он-сеа, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen de Peplesham было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Peplesham, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Rowse в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex nació aproximadamente 1312, en St Leonards-on-Sea, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen de Peplesham, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Peplesham, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joane Rowse en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1361, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra.
